segments.speaker: 题目13/14
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Hey, Rachel, are you still painting in your free time? Yes, I am. I've been experimenting with watercolors lately. That's cool. Have you taken classes or are you self taught? Up until recently, I just did it on my own, but I joined an online course last month, and it's been really helpful. I've learned some new techniques. Maybe I should try it too. I've always wanted to learn how to paint. You should. I'll send you the link to the course.
